comment: Smith was listed as Doubtful for Thursday's (Jul. 16) game against the Liberty but was postponed due to mechanical issues with the Liberty flight.

Magbegor was diagnosed with a facial fracture and will be reevaluated in the next couple of weeks, Percy Allen of the Seattle Time.
